subject: [AAF] Add CMPv2 Cert Service
commit_message:
[AAF] Add CMPv2 Cert Service

This new micro service allow retrieval of certificates using CMPv2
protocol and relay the requests to CA server (such as EJBCA provided in
contrib folder).

Issue-ID: AAF-1083
Change-Id: Ib3acba3d071533ad933d043f067147e8406d8fa8
Signed-off-by: EmmettCox <emmett.cox@est.tech>
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

You need to change EJBCA configuration and change response type to PBE:

ejbca.sh config cmp updatealias --alias cmpRA --key responseprotection --value pbe

> @all, are we sure the certificate retrieval works (SDNC Patch was meant to be the one "validating" that)?

On last meeting on 28th of May we discussed current situation and agreed that:
* SDNC part is descoped to Guilin release
* Both EJBCA and CertService should be merged to Frankfurt release to allow Guilin extensions right away without waiting for new release stabilization: 
** DCAE CMPv2 integration
** SDNC CMPv2 integration
** Extensions to CMPv2 service

@Sylvain, you were not present, but Krzysztof was and agreed to this plan. 

So, to proceed we need:
* create new PR with recent EJBCA (both_tls_and_plain) contribution for Frankfurt release
* merge this PR to master and check if it doesn't fail
* cherry pick this change to Frankfurt release
